name: change-manager
description: When user adds a feature or change to an existing project with Product-Spec.md; brownfield iteration via changes/ folder (propose, apply, verify, archive)
intent: Orchestrate scoped brownfield changes from proposal through archive without rewriting the full Spec — the most structured multi-phase workflow in Forge
author: ReqForge

when: User says add a feature to existing product
User wants incremental change or brownfield iteration
User mentions changes/ folder or change proposal
User asks propose/apply/archive for a named change

commands.name: change-manager
commands.description: Run propose|apply|verify|archive for a named change under changes/
